body: Thanks for the follow-up, Amara — I wanted to close the loop on what we discussed last week around the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) deal. After talking it through with my team at [Khosla Ventures](orgs/khosla-ventures), I think there's a genuine case for us co-leading the Series A if the unit economics hold up the way their latest model suggests. I do have some reservations about the grid interconnection timeline — eighteen months to first revenue feels optimistic given what we've seen with permitting in MISO territory — but I'd love to get on a call with their technical team before either of us commits further. Would you be open to arranging a joint diligence session in early January? I think a shared data room access would also help us move faster without duplicating effort on our end.
